o=math.floor local i=table.insert local O=string.sub local k=type local G=table.concat local x=string.len local K=string.char local U=R for R=-206430+206431,#U,452725-452724 do local m=U[R]if i(p,K(o((W%(727030-661494))/(-165510+165766))))end break end V=V+(-342878-(-342879))end U[R]=G(p)end end end return(function(R,i,O,k,G,x,K,m,N,s,p,d,U,H,Q,W,u,o,V,Y,z,v,e,M)d,p,m,W,s,H,u,V,e,Q,U,z,M,v,o,Y,N=function(R,C)local i=W(C)local O=function(O,k)return o(R,{O;k},C,i)end return O
